overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a black sports car driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The vehicle navigates through covered underpasses, intersections with massive holographic advertisements, and palm-lined boulevards with wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass transitioning to open intersection

events.description: exiting dark underpass into brightly lit neon intersection
slowing down while approaching major intersection with traffic signals

agents.ego_description: navigating through covered underpass and approaching a major neon-lit intersection

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with fluorescent strip lighting of the highway underpass
wall with glowing blue Japanese graffiti characters 天下無双
yellow and white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on wet asphalt
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark concrete underpass with glowing graffiti on the right wall. As the vehicle exits the tunnel, the scene opens into a neon-lit intersection with digital billboards and crosswalk markings visible on the wet reflective road surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with holographic advertisement and commercial buildings

events.description: approaching massive green holographic samurai figure dominating the intersection
executing right turn at intersection around the holographic display
passing other vehicles while driving past the softsys building

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersection with massive green hologram, turning right onto city street lined with neon signs

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving in the opposite direction, passing by the intersection

entered.detail: massive glowing green holographic figure of a samurai with sword towering over the intersection
tall building with large illuminated 'softsys' signage on the facade
elevated highway structure spanning across the road with support columns

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a major intersection dominated by a massive green holographic samurai figure. After turning right, the car drives past the illuminated softsys building and various neon billboards while navigating through light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with traffic accident scene

events.description: navigating through busy intersection with multiple vehicles crossing
encountering accident scene with smoking crashed vehicles blocking part of the roadway
swerving slightly to avoid debris from the accident scene

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through commercial streets and swerving to avoid a smoking traffic accident in the road

notable_agents.action: crashed vehicle with smoke billowing from it, stationary and blocking part of the lane

entered.detail: thick white smoke rising from crashed vehicles in the middle of the intersection
damaged car wreckage with steam and smoke emitting from the engine
street-level steam vents releasing white vapor onto the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial district with towering neon billboards, the vehicle encounters a traffic accident with smoking wreckage in the road. The driver swerves to avoid the debris while steam rises from street vents along the right sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal boulevard with palm trees and luxury advertisements

events.description: entering palm tree-lined street with different architectural style and visible sky
taking a curved ramp passing under an elevated highway structure
approaching intersection with crosswalk and digital countdown timer

agents.ego_description: cruising along palm-lined boulevard, passing luxury car advertisements and navigating curved underpass roads

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the boulevard, indicating coastal or tropical urban zone
red street sign with white text reading 'Crescent' mounted on a pole
large billboard displaying 'AVANTE' luxury vehicle advertisement with red and blue graphics
tall digital display showing the number '08' in white LED lights

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more open palm tree-lined boulevard with visible sky and coastal architecture. The vehicle passes under elevated highways, by luxury car advertisements, and navigates curved roads while approaching a Crescent street intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic concrete underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched boulevards of a futuristic city. It begins in a dark tunnel marked by glowing graffiti, quickly emerging into a rain-slicked intersection illuminated by digital billboards and reflective road surfaces. As the vehicle turns right, the scene expands past a massive green holographic samurai and the glowing Softsys building before weaving through a dense commercial district filled with towering advertisements. The camera then tracks the car as it swerves around smoking wreckage and rising street steam, shifting away from the urban congestion toward a more open, palm-lined boulevard. Finally, the environment opens up under elevated highways and luxury advertisements, following the curved road toward a coastal intersection under the night sky.
